wiki.title: Knowledge
wiki.headerGrowing: {{count}} pieces of knowledge are growing so far.
wiki.headerEmpty: Your knowledge is still empty. Want to add today's piece?
wiki.emptyTag: Nothing under this tag yet. Try another tag or add a piece.
wiki.emptyAll: The store is quiet. Add today's piece or a link and you'll meet it here again.

research.title: Find connections
research.headerFound: Found {{count}} connections among your scattered records.
research.headerNone: As records pile up, I'll find and show the links between them.
research.tip: Tap a tag to see its cluster.
research.lead: Here's how your scattered records connect
research.emptyInsight: No records to connect yet. Add today's piece and I'll draw the links here.
research.headline: The most-connected knowledge is '{{title}}'. Many records gather at this one point.
research.noLinks: Pieces have piled up but aren't linked yet. Add more and links will grow.
research.surprise: Found an unexpected link. '{{from}}' and '{{to}}' are different topics, yet they connect.

records.title: Archive
records.headerEmpty: You haven't saved any pieces yet.
records.lead: Everything you've saved, on one timeline
records.emptyAll: The archive is empty. Save today's piece and it'll gather onto one timeline.
records.emptyKind: No records of this type yet.

domains.title: My areas
domains.headerHas: Your areas are building up like this.
domains.tip: Want to add more to an empty area?
domains.empty: When pieces get tags, they gather into areas. Add today's piece.

inbox.title: Sorting tray
inbox.tip: Send them one by one and it empties fast.
inbox.emptyDone: All sorted. New pieces will arrive here.
inbox.remaining: Just {{count}} more to clear and you're done

recordDetail.title: Record detail
recordDetail.headerLinked: This piece is connected to {{count}} records.
recordDetail.headerAlone: Want to revisit this piece slowly?
recordDetail.tip: It links to records sharing the same tag.
recordDetail.author: Written by you
recordDetail.notFound: Couldn't find this record. Go back to the archive and open it again.

auth.signInLead: Build up your most valuable asset in the AI era: yourself.
auth.signUpLead: Light up your North Star from your very first piece.
auth.resetBody: Enter the 6-digit code to set it again.

account.title: Account
account.status: You own your account info, and connect only what you need.
account.tip: You can start deletion or export yourself anytime.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.status: Records are used only to support your self-understanding.
privacy.tip: Sensitive choices are always shown and confirmed first.
privacy.lead: Adjust how your data is used, yourself.
privacy.footer: The default is local-first. External transfers proceed only after your confirmation.

integrations.title: App integrations
integrations.status: You always confirm external apps before importing.
integrations.tip: Confirming before saving is safer than auto-saving.
integrations.footer: You review integration data before importing, and can disconnect anytime.

insights.title: Insights
insights.status: You saved more this week than last week.
insights.tip: Tap your most-saved topic to see the flow.
insights.lead: Compared to last week, this week you
insights.finding: Records about 'making things' passed the halfway mark. Same direction as your future self.

data.title: My data
data.subtitle: What's piled up, and where it's used
data.status: I show where your data is and how it's used.
data.tip: Sensitive data can stay on your device only.

theme.title: Theme · Font
theme.status: Pick a comfortable theme and font.
theme.tip: Reducing motion makes the screen calmer.

manual.title: Manual · Help
manual.status: Find what you're curious about, fast.
manual.tip: If you can't find it, just ask SecondB.
manual.q1: What are the 7 stars of the Big Dipper?
manual.q2: How does the North Star (Soul Core) brighten?
manual.q3: How do check results get more accurate?

plans.title: Plans
plans.status: If you want to build 'you' more deeply, Pro helps.
plans.tip: Even free, you can save daily and light each of the 7 stars once.
plans.freeFeat: Basic saving · 1 check per star · 5 SecondB chats/day

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.status: To save better, I request only the permissions needed.
permissions.tip: You can turn them off anytime.

graph.title: My brain map
graph.subtitle: {{nodes}} nodes · {{edges}} links
graph.status: Right now your records and knowledge clusters are strongly linked.
graph.tip: Tap a cluster to glance at just its related pieces.

discover.title: Trends
discover.status: The next step your interest is heading toward lately.
discover.tip: Tap a suggestion to jump to a related check or record.
discover.lead: The next step your interest is heading toward lately
discover.card1Body: Your most-saved topic over the last 3 weeks. Want to try the related attachment check (ECR-S)?
discover.card2Body: What your good-mood days share. Want to add more records to rhythm?
discover.footer: As more data piles up, new suggestions appear.

review.title: Review
review.status: If you've changed, we review the constellation together.
review.lead: If you've changed, review the constellation together
review.body: Recent records suggest your extraversion has risen. Raise the star's brightness?
review.footer: Nothing applies until you approve · every suggestion stays in your records

formats.title: Export format
formats.status: You can take your identity anywhere.
formats.tip: Pick a format and set the scope.

import.title: Import
import.status: You can bring in records from other apps too.
import.lead: Records from elsewhere, in one place
import.footer: Importing {{count}} items. Nothing applies without your approval.
